title: Marriott Vacations (VAC) Reports Contract Sales for Q4
text: Marriott Vacations (VAC) posts fourth-quarter 2021 contract sales. During the fourth quarter of 2021, the company reported contract sales of $406 million.

title: MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL ANNOUNCES RELEASE DATE FOR FOURTH QUARTER 2021 EARNINGS
text: BETHESDA, Md., Jan. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marriott International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAR) will report fourth quarter 2021 earnings results on Tuesday, February 15, 2022, at approximately 7:00 am Eastern Time (ET).

title: Marriott (MAR) on Expansion Spree, Signs 599 Agreements in 2021
text: Marriott (MAR) provides an update on 2021 development progress. In 2021, the company signed 599 agreements, which reflect roughly 92,000 rooms.

title: AC HOTELS BY MARRIOT® CHARLOTTE BALLANTYNE LOCATION NOW OPEN
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., Jan. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- AC Hotels by Marriott® has announced that the AC Hotel Charlotte Ballantyne has opened on January 20, 2022 bringing the brand's forward-thinking design approach to the affluent Ballantyne neighborhood.

title: Will Marriott (MAR) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: Marriott (MAR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: THE RITZ-CARLTON, DALLAS DEBUTS MULTIMILLION DOLLAR SPA RENOVATION
text: DALLAS, Jan. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Ritz-Carlton, Dallas , Texas' first and Dallas' only five-star hotel, proudly announces the multimillion dollar renovation completion of the 12,000 square foot luxury spa. Dallas-based design firm ForrestPerkins thoughtfully transformed The Spa at The Ritz-Carlton, Dallas into a tranquil and enchanted garden oasis, boasting delicate and timeless design work throughout.

title: Marriott International Provides an Update on Development Progress in 2021 and Overview of Key Trends Currently Shaping Hospitality Development
text: BETHESDA, Md., Jan. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- On the eve of the Americas Lodging Investment Summit (ALIS) in Los Angeles, Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAR) announces a strong year of rooms growth and signings in 2021.

title: Marriott Vacations (VAC) Benefits From Robust Occupancy
text: Marriott Vacations (VAC) benefits from strong occupancies (for most of its North America resorts) and solid contract sales.

title: 7 Travel and Tourism Stocks to Reserve Now for a Rebound in 2022
text: As Covid-19 recedes to the background and the pent-up demand for travel unleashes, tourism stocks are looking better with each passing day. The post 7 Travel and Tourism Stocks to Reserve Now for a Rebound in 2022 appeared first on InvestorPlace.

text: Don't look to tech for big gains today.
